    Index

    A B C D E G H I L M N P R S T U V W 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

    U

    update(double) - Method in class game.Explosion
    Updates remaining duration of the explosion.
    update(double) - Method in class game.GameEntity
    Updates the entity state each frame.
    update(double) - Method in class game.PowerUps.PowerUp
    Updates the powerup movement and duration.
    update(double) - Method in class game.Projectiles.EnemyProjectile
    Updates projectile position based on speed
    update(double) - Method in class game.Projectiles.PlayerProjectile
    Updates projectile position based on speed and frame
    update(double) - Method in class game.Ships.EnemyShip
    Advances frame count and moves enemy downward once arrived
    update(double) - Method in class game.Ships.PlayerShip
     
    update(double) - Method in class game.Ships.StrafingEnemy
     
    update(Input) - Method in class game.Screens.BattleScreen
    Called once per game frame.
    update(Input) - Method in class game.Screens.EndScreen
    Updates player ship movement only — no shooting allowed
    update(Input) - Method in class game.Screens.PauseScreen
    No entity updates occur while paused as time is frozen.
    update(Input) - Method in interface game.Screens.Screen
     
    update(Input) - Method in class game.Screens.StartScreen
    Updates the player ship movement only as no shooting allowed
    update(Input) - Method in class game.ShadowAliens
    Called once per frame.
    update(Input, double) - Method in class game.Ships.PlayerShip
    moves the ship and ticks timers based on input.
